---
title: Two-Factor ANOVA
subtitle: Practice Problems for PSY 241
author: Guenther, Benjamin A.
format: 
  revealjs:
    incremental: false
    html-math-method: mathjax
    self-contained-math: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import importlib
import stats_project 
import random

# This is to clear cache and reload after edits to the .py file
importlib.reload(stats_project)
from stats_project import FactorialData
```

## Problem 1 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
FactorialData(design = (2, 3), group_n = 10).factorial_ANOVA()
```
